title: The People Push Back — Closing Beat
description: Dressrosa’s citizens and allies resist the Birdcage together as the final countdown begins.
scene: On pages 14–18, Luffy, Doflamingo, Viola, Dressrosa Citizens, Colosseum Fighters move through the final crisis of Dressrosa as the Birdcage and Doflamingo’s rule reach their breaking point.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: It's not enough! It's just pushing us along with it!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Beyond the factory, in front of the cage

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: The Contraction's beginning to slow down a bit...I think!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Forsooth! Now that you mention it, I believe I can perceive something similar!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: you! What are you here to...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Oh, my my my my my my! I unfortunately cannot see you, whoever you may be, but...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: I guess you really can't leave the insane alone to their own devices!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: I may not have much strength left in these old bones, but...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: Allow me the honor of assisting you!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: All units! I don't care who you are,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: Move to support the cage pushing!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: Those of you that can't use Haki, to the factory!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: If you strength you need, we've got it in spades!

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: At the very least, we should help protect our own country!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: We want to push with everyone else!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: Oh my... the people have spoken...

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: Warriors! We can be of help too!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #32
dialogue.text: Like we'd just let Doflamingo cut us all up!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #42
dialogue.text: So it really can be stopped!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #43
dialogue.text: DORO- Zenbai! You knew it all along!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #44
dialogue.text: Don't Let Up! Keep pushing! We gotta buy as much time as we can!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #45
dialogue.text: If it contracts any more than this ...plenty of lives will be lost!

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Fighters
dialogue.text: Everything going okay!? How much longer till Lucy's back on his feet!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #49
dialogue.text: One minute left till Luffy's recovery!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #50
dialogue.text: Together, hand in hand, we've all given you this last minute! Everyone's waiting, Luffy!

summary: This part focuses on the people push back, keeping the final battle centered on Luffy, Law, Doflamingo, and the people trapped inside the Birdcage.
